content: Stormcloak Soldier: You Imperial cunts think you're so high and mighty with your polished armor, but I've seen your kind on your knees more than you've seen battle. Bet you’ve taken more Imperial cock than you’ve swung that sword of yours. Imperial Soldier: Oh, fuck off, you blue-clad bastard. At least we don’t fuck our cousins like you Stormcloak savages. I’ve spilled more Nord blood than you’ve spilled cum, and every last one of you pigs begged before the end. Stormcloak Soldier: Begged? Ha! Last Imperial I killed squealed like a whore when I split her open with my axe. How’s your little Legate Hrongar? Still limping from when my brothers gangbanged her in Falkreath? Imperial Soldier: You think that’s clever?
